---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do? What's getting in the way?

## Proposed solution

The behavior or API you'd like to see. If a CLI flag, describe the command shape.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Scope check

recall is a local search engine. It indexes, chunks, embeds, searches, retrieves. It does not call LLMs, modify user files, or make HTTP requests in the default path. Does this request stay inside those lines? If not, would it fit better in [brain](https://github.com/ugurcan-aytar/brain)?

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, prior art (including how `qmd` or another tool handles this).
